Please do not upload full model files, confidential project data, local paths, or license-server information here.

```text

```

## Basic Information

```text
Marc/Mentat version:
Windows version:
Research or engineering field:
Current problem:
Solver exit number, if any:
Can you share screenshots or log excerpts privately:
Need: trial / one-time diagnosis / monthly use / project support
```

## Public Safety

Before posting anything in this public issue:

- remove project names;
- remove company names;
- remove full local paths;
- remove confidential geometry or material details;
- do not upload full `.mud`, `.mfd`, `.dat`, `.t16`, or project folders.

If your problem involves private model data, please contact the author by email or WeChat instead of posting details here.
